steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• $18x=25$: Subtracting 25 from 205 gives 180, not 25. Eliminated.
  • $18x=155$: $205 - 25 = 180 \neq 155$. Eliminated.
  • $18x=180$: Subtracting 25 from both sides of the original equation gives exactly $18x = 180$. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
  • $18x=205$: That would mean 25 was never subtracted. Eliminated.
